commit.subject: LU-17194 osc: get srvlock from otp
commit.message:
LU-17194 osc: get srvlock from otp

Get the srvlock value from an otp, not the oio.  This
removes another use of the cl_io/osc_io in dio_submit.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I98ac7d09c0ef0ba8841905bafaf2fd396d50e646
